/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libexplore_lite_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/explore_lite_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/explore_lite_msgs/msg/explore_status__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
